recommendations.title: Raanjhanaa
recommendations.overview: A small-town boy needs to break through the class divide to gain acceptance from his childhood sweetheart who is in love with big city ideals.

recommendations.title: Zero
recommendations.overview: Short in stature but big on love, a bachelor meets two very different women who broaden his horizons and help him find purpose in life.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: An early-20th-century tale of love across class boundaries which tells the legendary and romantic story of Lady Chatterley’s affair with her gamekeeper. Jed Mercurio’s adaptation of DH Lawrence’s classic.

recommendations.title: Tanu Weds Manu
recommendations.overview: Manu comes to India to find a bride for himself and falls for Tanu at first sight but she is a free spirited girl has no plans of marrying him.

recommendations.title: Tanu Weds Manu: Returns
recommendations.overview: After Tanu and Manu's marriage breaks apart, the latter finds himself smitten by Datto, a lookalike of his ex-wife. But the estranged couple's feelings begin to spark again.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.

recommendations.title: Looks That Kill
recommendations.overview: A teenager lives out the hilarious and often tragic consequences of being lethally attractive, until he meets a girl with a congenital defect.

recommendations.title: Hello, Goodbye, and Everything in Between
recommendations.overview: Clare and Aidan make a pact to break up before college — no regrets, no broken hearts. But will one epic goodbye date offer them a last chance at love?

recommendations.title: F*ck Love Too
recommendations.overview: In this romantic comedy, several friends, each dealing with unhappy love lives, turn to each other for help - but not always with the best results.
recommendations.director: Aram van de Rest, Appie Boudellah

recommendations.title: Boy Meets Girl
recommendations.overview: In Kentucky, a transgender woman and her best male friend lament the lack of eligible partners and step across old boundaries of love and romance.
